@graph.name: Share Buyback Valuation Services | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Valuation for share buyback under Section 68 Companies Act. Fair value determination, SEBI buyback regulations, tax implications. IBBI Registered Valuer.

mainEntity.name: Is valuation mandatory for share buyback?

acceptedAnswer.text: The answer depends on the specific provisions of the applicable Act/regulation and your factual situation. Virtual Auditor provides definitive advisory backed by FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV credentials. Contact us for clarity.

mainEntity.name: Who can issue a buyback valuation report?

acceptedAnswer.text: This service can be provided by qualified professionals with relevant credentials. At Virtual Auditor, CA V. Viswanathan holds FCA (ICAI), ACS (ICSI), CFE (ACFE USA), and IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) certifications — covering the full spectrum of regulatory requirements. Our practice operates from Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai.

mainEntity.name: What is the tax on buyback under Section 115QA?

acceptedAnswer.text: the tax on buyback under Section 115QA is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

mainEntity.name: What methods are used for buyback valuation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI Registered Valuer practice. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 or visit virtualauditor.in for detailed guidance specific to your situation.

mainEntity.name: Can a company buy back shares at a price higher than fair value?

acceptedAnswer.text: This depends on the specific facts and regulatory framework applicable to your situation. Virtual Auditor provides case-specific advisory after understanding your circumstances. Call +91-99622 60333 for a preliminary assessment.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between buyback and capital reduction?

acceptedAnswer.text: the difference between buyback and capital reduction is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.
